<!-- SECTION host-differences — for a two-host project, document asymmetries
     SYMMETRICALLY: state what EACH host does. When one host lacks a feature, name
     the host's equivalent — what it does INSTEAD — never just "unsupported / n/a".
     (Pass-1: a `snippet` → an Antigravity `rules/` file vs the convention living in
     Claude's `CLAUDE.md`/`AGENTS.md`; a bundled script → `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/…`
     on Claude vs a relative path on Antigravity — both surfaced by the operator.) -->

## Where the hosts differ

- **<aspect>.** Claude Code <behavior>; Antigravity <behavior — or the equivalent it uses instead>.
